sections.paragraph:
verb לספוק

to clap (hands in sorrow)

verb לספק

to provide, supply; satisfy, please, content

verb סופק

be provided, supplied

verb סופק

verb סופק

be in doubt, doubtful, to hesitate

verb להסתפק

be satisfied with, to make do with, content with; use, take supplies from; be in doubt

verb להספיק

be sufficient, enough, adequate; supply; enable; manage, succeed, make it

verb לספק (>>סיפק)

to provide, supply

noun

supplier, provider, outfitter, purveyor

masculine noun ספק (>>סיפק)

possibility, ability; sufficiency

masculine noun

doubt, qualm, misgiving, incertitude, query, question, unlikelihood, unlikeliness, dubiousness
